overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic survival game showing a character walking through an overgrown urban environment during a heavy rainstorm. The character traverses an elevated glass walkway, passes another survivor, and enters a dark abandoned building.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown elevated glass walkway with rain-streaked panels

events.description: character briefly raises hand to face while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked elevated walkway, observing the flooded street below through the glass walls

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge with metal frames and large rain-streaked glass panels
tall modern glass and concrete building visible through the rain
rusted structural steel beams supporting the glass walkway roof
dense green ivy vines covering the metal framework and glass edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated glass walkway during a heavy rainstorm. The structure features metal beams and glass panels streaked with rain, with an abandoned office building visible through the glass on the left. Vegetation overgrows the walkway edges, and the character briefly raises a hand to their face while moving forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance transition with fabric canopy

events.description: male survivor becomes visible standing near the building entrance ahead
character passes by the standing survivor and approaches the dark doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a male survivor standing near the entrance, continuing toward the dark doorway

notable_agents.action: male survivor standing near the entrance, observing the approach before being passed

entered.detail: tattered fabric and metal canopy sheltering the building entrance
dark open doorway leading into the abandoned building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the walkway where a male survivor stands near a tattered canopy entrance. Dense vegetation covers the area around the doorway. The character passes the stationary survivor and continues toward the dark interior doorway, with the abandoned office building now closer on the left.

events.description: character steps from the rainy exterior into the dimly lit building interior
moving deeper into the dark corridor with visibility decreasing significantly

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the dark building interior, leaving the rain behind as visibility drops to near darkness

entered.detail: unlit hallway extending into pitch darkness with debris scattered on the floor
frosted glass office partitions covered in grime and dust
scattered rubble and detritus covering the marble floor

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the threshold into the abandoned building, transitioning from the rainy exterior to a dimly lit interior. The space features frosted glass partitions and debris-covered floors. As the character moves deeper, the corridor grows progressively darker until only the faint outline of the entrance remains visible behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked elevated walkway into the oppressive darkness of an abandoned interior. It begins with the character traversing a glass and metal structure streaked with heavy rain, passing overgrown vegetation and the facade of a weathered office building. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a tattered canopy entrance where a stationary male survivor stands amidst dense greenery. The camera then follows the character past the survivor and across the threshold, transitioning from the bright, rainy exterior into a dimly lit space filled with frosted glass partitions and debris. Finally, the environment grows progressively darker as the character moves deeper into the building, until the entrance becomes a faint outline in the distance.
